### step: create-parent
$ bd create Parent issue -t task -p 1 --json
exit: 0
stdout:
{
  "created_at": "<TIMESTAMP>",
  "created_by": "parity-author",
  "id": "<ID>",
  "issue_type": "task",
  "owner": "parity@bd.test",
  "priority": 1,
  "schema_version": 1,
  "status": "open",
  "title": "Parent issue",
  "updated_at": "<TIMESTAMP>"
}

stderr:


### step: create-child
$ bd create Child issue -t task -p 2 --json
exit: 0
stdout:
{
  "created_at": "<TIMESTAMP>",
  "created_by": "parity-author",
  "id": "<ID>",
  "issue_type": "task",
  "owner": "parity@bd.test",
  "priority": 2,
  "schema_version": 1,
  "status": "open",
  "title": "Child issue",
  "updated_at": "<TIMESTAMP>"
}

stderr:


### step: dep-add
$ bd dep add <ID> <ID> --type blocks
exit: 0
stdout:
✓ Added dependency: <ID> (Child issue) depends on <ID> (Parent issue) (blocks)

stderr:


### step: ready
$ bd ready --json
exit: 0
stdout:
[
  {
    "id": "<ID>",
    "title": "Parent issue",
    "status": "open",
    "priority": 1,
    "issue_type": "task",
    "owner": "parity@bd.test",
    "created_at": "<TIMESTAMP>",
    "created_by": "parity-author",
    "updated_at": "<TIMESTAMP>",
    "dependency_count": 0,
    "dependent_count": 1,
    "comment_count": 0
  }
]

stderr:


### step: claim-parent
$ bd update <ID> --claim --assignee tester --json
exit: 0
stdout:
[
  {
    "id": "<ID>",
    "title": "Parent issue",
    "status": "in_progress",
    "priority": 1,
    "issue_type": "task",
    "assignee": "tester",
    "owner": "parity@bd.test",
    "created_at": "<TIMESTAMP>",
    "created_by": "parity-author",
    "updated_at": "<TIMESTAMP>",
    "started_at": "<TIMESTAMP>"
  }
]

stderr:


### step: comment
$ bd comment <ID> parity scenario comment
exit: 0
stdout:
✓ Comment added to <ID> — Parent issue

stderr:


### step: close-parent
$ bd close <ID> --reason scenario complete
exit: 0
stdout:
✓ Closed <ID> — Parent issue: scenario complete

stderr:


### step: export
$ bd export
exit: 0
stdout:
{"_type":"issue","id":"<ID>","title":"Child issue","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"parity@bd.test","created_at": "<TIMESTAMP>","created_by":"parity-author","updated_at": "<TIMESTAMP>","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"<ID>","depends_on_id":"<ID>","type":"blocks","created_at": "<TIMESTAMP>"}],"dependency_count":1,"dependent_count":0,"comment_count":0}
{"_type":"issue","id":"<ID>","title":"Parent issue","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"tester","owner":"parity@bd.test","created_at": "<TIMESTAMP>","created_by":"parity-author","updated_at": "<TIMESTAMP>","started_at": "<TIMESTAMP>","closed_at": "<TIMESTAMP>","close_reason":"scenario complete","comments":[{"id":"<UUID>","issue_id":"<ID>","author":"parity-author","text":"parity scenario comment","created_at": "<TIMESTAMP>"}],"dependency_count":0,"dependent_count":1,"comment_count":1}

stderr:
